title: Craftable End Portal Frames! (Mod)
description:
A way to craft the end portal frame!
This is a hard recipe!
body:
This is a mod that allows you to craft the end portal frames!
The recipe is hard so put yourself to the challenge of making a full portal!

Consider checking out my [carrd.co](https://itztiger.carrd.co/)!

[![CurseForge link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/craftable-end-portal-frames-mod) [![Planet Minecraft Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6da1310cd0843c9c599870318ccde9ebfc951305_0.webp)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/craftable-end-portal-frames-mod/)

[![Available as a datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/963d3ebf101bf5167fc6626ee7c44ae6f7c754ea.png)](https://modrinth.com/project/craftable-end-portal-frames!)

**Note:** This mod was made by using Modrinth's package as mod feature.
